interpreted_last_name.description: Output the surname. If the row uses ditto marks or leaves the surname blank for a family member living in the same household, strictly output the literal string '[DITTO]'. Do not attempt to guess or resolve the name.

married_within_year.description: Column 10: Married within the year. Capture any mark, slash, or character present; otherwise null.

attended_school.description: Column 11: Attended school within the year. Capture any mark, slash, or character present; otherwise null.

cannot_read_write.description: Column 12: Persons over 20 y'rs of age who cannot read & write. Capture any mark or character present; otherwise null.

infirmities.description: Column 13: Whether deaf, dumb, blind, insane, idiotic, pauper, or convict. Capture the written description exactly; otherwise null.

transcription_notes.description: If you mark a row's confidence_score as 'MEDIUM' or 'LOW', you must explicitly state which field(s) (e.g., age, occupation, or name) are uncertain inside this field.
